visual_description: The older man in a grey suit opens a dark door and escorts a younger man in a patterned shirt out of the room. He walks across the tiled room, passing a wooden bench with carved designs, while two men in dark clothing stand nearby watching. The older man continues walking and raises his hand near his face as he moves.
audio_description: The audio is unclear, with faint ambient sounds and indistinct male voices.
